# connectracer_wisdom_assistants (Data Source)

Fetches a list of AWS Wisdom assistants

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "connectracer_wisdom_assistants" "example" {
}

output "assistants" {
  value = data.connectracer_wisdom_assistants.example.assistants
}

output "assistant_names" {
  value = [for assistant in data.connectracer_wisdom_assistants.example.assistants : assistant.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `assistants` (Attributes List) List of assistants (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assistants))
- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier

<a id="nestedatt--assistants"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assistants`

Read-Only:

- `assistant_arn` (String) The ARN of the assistant
- `assistant_id` (String) The ID of the assistant
- `integration_configuration` (Attributes) The integration configuration for the assistant (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assistants--integration_configuration))
- `name` (String) The name of the assistant
- `status` (String) The status of the assistant
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags associated with the assistant
- `type` (String) The type of the assistant

<a id="nestedatt--assistants--integration_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assistants.integration_configuration`

Read-Only:

- `topic_integration_arn` (String) The ARN of the topic integration
